steps.title: Identify the tangent ratio
steps.content: Angles $A$ and $B$ are acute, so angle $C$ is the right angle. Relative to angle $B$, side $AC$ is opposite and side $BC$ is adjacent.

steps.title: Find the adjacent side
steps.content: Use the tangent ratio: $$\tan B=\frac{AC}{BC}$$ $$\frac{1}{4}=\frac{24.1}{BC}$$ $$BC=24.1(4)=96.4$$ The answer is C.
